explanation.summary: Carbs are carrying this food most, while fats are the biggest drag. It lands in B tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in B tier with an overall score of 47 from a base nutrition score of 47. Context barely changed the result.

topPros.title: fairly satiating for the portion
topPros.explanation: Dense texture and fibre can help fullness.

topPros.title: easy to use as a practical wholefood snack
topPros.explanation: Convenient and shelf-stable enough to fit many routines.

topPros.title: contains useful polyphenols
topPros.explanation: Adds extra plant-compound value beyond the standard nutrient table.

topCons.title: contains some anti-nutrients
topCons.explanation: Phytates may reduce mineral absorption somewhat.

topCons.title: easy to overeat calories quickly
topCons.explanation: Energy density can add up fast in large handfuls.

topCons.title: not suitable for everyone
topCons.explanation: Tree nut allergy risk matters in practice.
